content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible curving rightward, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track heading westward.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 79, target index = (79+5) % 121 = 84
- WP84: x=1.3863, y=4.4578
- Car: x=1.5706, y=4.3662, heading=-166.856°
- dy = 4.4578 - 4.3662 = +0.0916
- dx = 1.3863 - 1.5706 = -0.1843
- bearing = atan2(0.0916, -0.1843) = 180° - atan(0.0916/0.1843) = 180° - 26.47° = **153.53°**
- delta = 153.53° - (-166.856°) = 320.386° → normalize: 320.386 - 360 = **-39.61°** → right correction needed

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3810m, distance_from_center = 0.1036m, is_left_of_center=true
- edge_distance (left) = 0.3810 - 0.1036 = **0.2774m** → clear
- delta = -39.61° → steer right (away from left edge) → no boundary concern

Delta ≈ -40°: |delta| 30-50°, steer right: steering_angle=-15 to -20, speed=1.0-1.5.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, WP84 is to the right of current heading (delta≈-40°), requiring moderate-strong right steering to follow the waypoint line.",

    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",

    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP55-70 region: track bends southwest with gentle-to-moderate left curve.",
    "WP70-85 section: heading ~-165 to -170°, delta consistently around -30 to -40° requiring right correction.",
    "Car consistently 0.09-0.10m left of center in WP78-84 section — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >45°.",
    "WP80+ region: track curves south/southeast back toward start.",
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length, car at ~66.8% progress.",
    "Delta increasing from -30 to -40 in WP79-84 range — track curving more sharply right."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.857, 1.766, 1.657, 1.571],
    "y": [4.443, 4.411, 4.382, 4.366],
    "heading": [-168.328, -166.088, -165.662, -166.856]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP84 at (1.386, 4.458): bearing≈153.53°, delta≈-39.61° → moderate-strong right correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
